First up today, **Eriq Gardner** spotlights the latest twist in the long-running legal feud between Warner Bros. TV and the *fiercely* protective **Michael Crichton** estate over MaxвҖҷs new medical drama, *The Pitt* , which emerged just as talks to reboot *ER* вҖ”the вҖҷ90s NBC juggernaut that Crichton createdвҖ”fell apart. It may not be a copyright case, per se, but it could have real implications for how вҖңderivative worksвҖқ are assessed.     Plus, below the fold: **Tara Palmeri** details the blowback inside Mar-a-Lago as **Donald Trump** begins stocking his administration. **Marion Maneker** turns a klieg light on the **Cecily Brown** phenomenon. On *The Town* , **Matt Belloni** is joined by director **R.J. Cutler** to candidly discuss **Martha Stewart** вҖҷs disapproval of his new Netflix documentary. On *The Varsity* , **John Ourand** and NBC SportsвҖҷ **Mike** **Florio** unpack the biggest issues facing the NFL today. And on *The Powers That Be* , **Bill Cohan** joins **Peter Hamby** to examine how Wall Street is pricing in the second Trump eraвҖ”the tariffs, the tax cuts, and a fresh wave of corporate bullying. | |  | | [The Reskinning of an вҖҳERвҖҷ Reboot](https://email.puck.) | | ERIQ GARDNER | | Warner Bros. TV has fired back at Sherri CrichtonвҖҷs lawsuit over MaxвҖҷs new medical drama, вҖҳThe Pitt,вҖҷ which she claims is little more than an вҖҳERвҖҷ knockoff. Max claims that Sherri is trying to monopolize the medical genre. But itвҖҷs not that simple. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [The Grenell Snub, RubioвҖҷs Rise & The MAGA Divide](https://email.puck.) | | TARA PALMERI | | Tensions arise in Mar-a-Lago as Trump bypasses longtime confidant Ric Grenell for Marco Rubio as Secretary of State, sparking angst among the MAGA faithful and perpetuating questions about TrumpвҖҷs loyalty. | |  | | [A Cecily Brown Christmas](https://email.puck.) | | MARION MANEKER | | A major retrospective at the Dallas Museum of Art, plus a show at the Paula Cooper Gallery, make the case for the painter as one of the most compelling, intellectually and politically engaged artists at work today. | |  | | [Martha Stewart & When a Celeb Disavows Their DocвҖ”With the Director!](https://email.puck.) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | Matt is joined by R.J. Cutler, director of the Netflix documentary вҖҳMarthaвҖҷ and the upcoming film вҖҳElton John: Never Too Late,вҖҷ to talk about Martha StewartвҖҷs disapproval of the film, directors maintaining creative control over their projects, and the inherent and necessary struggle of collaborating with a major celebrity on a documentary. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [NFL Growing Pains](https://email.puck.) | | JOHN OURAND | | John is joined by NBC SportsвҖҷ Mike Florio, creator of ProFootballTalk, to contemplate the biggest dramas facing the NFL today: the debate surrounding whether (and how) to add an additional game to the schedule, the push to expand its international footprint, the leagueвҖҷs surprising difficulty selling NFL media, and much more. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Wall StreetвҖҷs Trump 2.0 Trade](https://email.puck.) | | PETER HAMBY & WILLIAM D. COHAN | | Bill Cohan joins Peter to examine how Wall Street is pricing the second Trump eraвҖ”the tariffs, the tax cuts, and all the corporate bullying. Bill runs down the list of familiar faces jockeying for Cabinet positions (Gary, Schwarzman, PaulsonвҖҰ), plus some surprising names that are suddenly in contention. Then they discuss how investors are playing the market rally, and whether crypto will get a Trump bump. | | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUSngxNURDNmloNy1UWlJ1QWFkND0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
